calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-02-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for Court Trial/Prove Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Miles Lendway.

Plaintiff Adil Shaikh appearing on his own behalf.
Plaintiff Adil Shaikh sworn and examined on his own behalf.
No appearance by Defendant Melissa Wall.
After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
Defendants Does 1-10 dismissed without prejudice.
The Rental Agreement is canceled.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 118 Taylor Street, #204 San Francisco, CA 94102.
Damages $3,540.00
Holdover damages $2,580.00
Pre-judgment interest $0.00
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs $240.00
for a Total Judgment of $6,360.00
Judgment signed in open court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Sep-02-2014 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-27-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Lillian K. Sing; Clerk L. Fong, Matter Not Reported (D501)
Appearance(s) on Wednesday, August 27, 2014:
Plaintiff Adil Shaikh is present, appearing in Propria Persona.

No appearance by or on behalf of defendant Melissa Wall. The settlement conference is placed off calendar. The trial date of September 2, 2014 remains on calendar.
